news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems secures a ₹226.4 crore order, boosting its order book.
The order enhances Titagarh's near-term execution pipeline.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems secures a ₹226.4 crore order, boosting its order book.
The order enhances Titagarh's near-term execution pipeline.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems received LOI from JSW Port Logistics for 720 wagons.
The order is expected to be executed within 6 months of the effective date.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems received LOI from JSW Port Logistics for 720 wagons.
The order is expected to be executed within 6 months of the effective date.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems to sell 100% of dormant unit, Titagarh Singapore, to Worldvmc Singapore for $154,707.
The transaction is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems to sell 100% of dormant unit, Titagarh Singapore, to Worldvmc Singapore for $154,707.
The transaction is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail secures Rs 44.4-cr order to supply rakes for HR coil transport on Indian Railways.
Q3 FY26 net profit dipped 23.5% YoY to Rs 48.03 cr; shares rose 2.1% to Rs 628.6 on BSE.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail secures Rs 44.4-cr order to supply rakes for HR coil transport on Indian Railways.
Q3 FY26 net profit dipped 23.5% YoY to Rs 48.03 cr; shares rose 2.1% to Rs 628.6 on BSE.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd received a Letter of Intent for providing 2 BFNS 22.9T rakes on lease to Indian Railways for 10 years.
The order, valued at ₹44.41 Cr (incl. GST), was awarded by Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd under the Wagon Leasing Business.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd received a Letter of Intent for providing 2 BFNS 22.9T rakes on lease to Indian Railways for 10 years.
The order, valued at ₹44.41 Cr (incl. GST), was awarded by Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd under the Wagon Leasing Business.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems' ₹13,955 Cr order book is 77% driven by its Passenger Rail segment, aligning with India's railway modernization efforts.
Shares rose 3.3% to ₹642.35. TRSL holds 25% wagon market share and focuses on rail mobility, defense, and shipbuilding.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems' ₹13,955 Cr order book is 77% driven by its Passenger Rail segment, aligning with India's railway modernization efforts.
Shares rose 3.3% to ₹642.35. TRSL holds 25% wagon market share and focuses on rail mobility, defense, and shipbuilding.

news.title:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.
news.summary:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems' associate Firema sold its business unit to Fabbrica Italiana Treni for EUR 66M.
The transfer aids Firema's debt repayment; no impact on Titagarh's operations or shareholding reported.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems' associate Firema sold its business unit to Fabbrica Italiana Treni for EUR 66M.
The transfer aids Firema's debt repayment; no impact on Titagarh's operations or shareholding reported.

news.title:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.
news.summary:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems has disclosed its Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript.
The transcript is available on the company's website for public reference.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems has disclosed its Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript.
The transcript is available on the company's website for public reference.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail forecasts increased orders for freight rail systems due to steady wagon demand.
Indian Railways aims to transport 3 billion tons of freight by 2030.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail forecasts increased orders for freight rail systems due to steady wagon demand.
Indian Railways aims to transport 3 billion tons of freight by 2030.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail starts Vande Bharat car body production; first rake (16 cars) expected by March 2026.
First train set completion slated for Q3 next FY; initial revenue expected this quarter via completion accounting.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail starts Vande Bharat car body production; first rake (16 cars) expected by March 2026.
First train set completion slated for Q3 next FY; initial revenue expected this quarter via completion accounting.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail may miss FY26 target of 100-120 metro cars but expects close progress in Q4.
Pune's aluminum metro coaches production to begin post new line completion by Q3/Q4 FY27.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail may miss FY26 target of 100-120 metro cars but expects close progress in Q4.
Pune's aluminum metro coaches production to begin post new line completion by Q3/Q4 FY27.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems reports strong passenger segment growth.
The company has an order book worth Rs.14,455 Cr for FY26.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems reports strong passenger segment growth.
The company has an order book worth Rs.14,455 Cr for FY26.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail expects clarity on its Italian unit Firema by April.
The company is preparing for Vande Bharat train deliveries.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail expects clarity on its Italian unit Firema by April.
The company is preparing for Vande Bharat train deliveries.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems raised Rs.199.99 Cr via convertible warrants on Nov 4, 2025.
Rs.49.99 Cr received upfront till Dec 31, 2025; funds used as planned for various purposes.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems raised Rs.199.99 Cr via convertible warrants on Nov 4, 2025.
Rs.49.99 Cr received upfront till Dec 31, 2025; funds used as planned for various purposes.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail's Q3 net profit fell to 557M INR from 689M YoY.
Revenue decreased to 8.2B INR in Q3, down from 8.7B YoY.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail's Q3 net profit fell to 557M INR from 689M YoY.
Revenue decreased to 8.2B INR in Q3, down from 8.7B YoY.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems approved Q3 and 9M unaudited results ending Dec 31, 2025.
CEO Saket Kandoi resigned; shipbuilding now discontinued with Rs 30.5 Cr Q3 revenue.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems approved Q3 and 9M unaudited results ending Dec 31, 2025.
CEO Saket Kandoi resigned; shipbuilding now discontinued with Rs 30.5 Cr Q3 revenue.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems gains approval as Wagon Leasing Company by Indian Railways.
This allows owning and leasing wagons, diversifying business and boosting freight efficiency.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems gains approval as Wagon Leasing Company by Indian Railways.
This allows owning and leasing wagons, diversifying business and boosting freight efficiency.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd announces Q3 and 9M FY26 Earnings Call on 16th Feb 2026.
The call will be at 4:00 PM IST via audio; recording will be uploaded on their website.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd announces Q3 and 9M FY26 Earnings Call on 16th Feb 2026.
The call will be at 4:00 PM IST via audio; recording will be uploaded on their website.
